title: EDEN worker
description: A registered worker identity within a single experiment. Workers register before claiming or submitting tasks; per-experiment registry scope per spec/v0/02-data-model.md §6. The wire-visible shape MUST NOT carry the worker's authentication credential or its hash.

worker_id.description: Operator-supplied identifier; lowercase alphanumeric plus `-` / `_`; first character non-hyphen, non-underscore. Reserved values (`admin`, `system`, `internal`) MUST be rejected by `register_worker` even though the grammar admits them.

registered_by.description: Actor identifier of the credential that performed the registration (typically the admin sentinel `admin`).

labels.description: Free-form deployment metadata. The protocol does not interpret labels.
